race.description: Concrete Industry Supplies - John Clift Memorial (Bm58) Hcp
race.comment: ECHELON (4) consistent gelding with his hoof on the till. From an in-form stable and looks to find his race fourth-up with the 4kg claim. Just over a month between runs when nailed late after leading early with a narrow second over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Gets the right run and expected to go close. ALMOST MAYBE (5) finally draws a decent gate third-up on his home track. Covered a stack of ground in the run with a fighting sixth over 1000m at this track. Drawn the inside and looks to get the right set-up with Partridge's 4kg claim. Leading player. MISS MERCY (8) hung out badly and covered plenty of ground with a tiring last over 1050m at Rockhampton. Won well two-back and deserves another chance. ZAMPANO (1) is capable on his day and worth noting his best form is over this track and trip. Shouldered the 61.5kg with a narrow sixth over 950m at Moree. Bar plates (front) come off and stays in the mix from the inside gate.
